name: HWM_EXT_TIMECARD_DETAIL_V
query: SELECT rec.TM_REC_ID , rec.ORIG_TM_REC_ID , rec.ORIG_TM_REC_VERSION , rec.TM_REC_VERSION , rec.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER , rec.ENTERPRISE_ID , rec.TM_REC_TYPE , rec.ACTIVITY_TYPE , rec.ACTIVITY_EVENT_TIME , rec.MEASURE , rec.UNIT_OF_MEASURE , rec.START_TIME , rec.STOP_TIME , rec.USER_STATUS , rec.DELETE_FLAG , rec.LAYER_CODE , rec.COMMENT_TEXT , rec.RESOURCE_ID , rec.RESOURCE_TYPE , rec.SUBRESOURCE_ID , rec.TIME_REPORTER_ID , rec.DATE_FROM , rec.DATE_TO , trunc(rec.START_TIME) START_TIME_TRUNC, trunc(rec.STOP_TIME) STOP_TIME_TRUNC, trunc(rec.DATE_FROM) DATE_FROM_TRUNC, trunc(rec.DATE_TO) DATE_TO_TRUNC, rec.ORDER_ENTERED , rec.TCSMR_SET_ID , rec.TCSMR_CONFIG_SET_ID , rec.DATA_SET_ID , rec.LATEST_VERSION , rec.CREATED_BY , rec.CREATION_DATE , rec.LAST_UPDATED_BY , rec.LAST_UPDATE_DATE , rec.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN , usg.TM_REC_GRP_USAGES_ID , usg.TM_REC_GRP_ID , usg.TM_REC_GRP_VERSION , hdv. PARENT_TM_REC_GRP_ID , hdv. PARENT_TM_REC_GRP_VERSION , hgt.NAME AS GRP_TYPE_NAME FROM HWM_TM_REC rec, HWM_TM_REC_GRP_USAGES usg , HWM_TM_REC_GRP hdv , hwm_grp_type hgt WHERE REC.TM_REC_ID = USG.TM_REC_ID AND REC.TM_REC_VERSION = USG.TM_REC_VERSION AND usg.TM_REC_GRP_ID = hdv.TM_REC_GRP_ID AND usg.TM_REC_GRP_VERSION = hdv.TM_REC_GRP_VERSION AND hdv.grp_type_id = hgt.grp_type_id AND NVL(REC.DELETE_FLAG, 'N') <> 'Y' AND USG.LATEST_VERSION = 'Y'
